news.title: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most
news.summary: Prices related to travel, recreation and food saw particularly steep increases. Americans' wallets are stretching as they celebrate the unofficial start of summer.

news.title: Trump says Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated,' will be announced soon
news.summary: A fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8. It has been punctuated by skirmishes as the U.S. and Iran jockey over the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: The Middle East war is testing the Gulf's ambitions to become an AI hub
news.summary: High energy prices have altered the calculus for operators of the facilities, analysts say. Attacks on data centers in the Middle East and persistently high energy prices are changing the calculus.

news.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these dividend stocks for steady income
news.summary: Investors seeking consistent income can consider adding dividend stocks to their portfolios. Amid ongoing uncertainty, investors seeking consistent Income can consider investing in dividend stocks.

news.title: Spirit's collapse, high fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
news.summary: Memorial Day weekend is the unofficial start of the summer travel season. The holiday weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.

news.title: Stocks are riding an earnings hot streak — but investors are facing a summer that’s rife with risks
news.summary: The U.S. stock market has arrived at the unofficial start of summer with major benchmarks sitting at record highs. But a few factors could make for a bumpy ride in the months ahead.

news.title: ‘We have longevity in the family’: My sister is turning 67. Should she wait until 70 to claim Social Security?
news.summary: Some say she should start at full retirement age. “Others say she Should Start at Full retirement age’, she says. ‘I’m a woman. I should be able to retire,’ she adds.

news.title: I’m 67. Our family trust earns $300,000 annually for my kids. How do I ensure they won’t get killed on taxes?
news.summary: “My thought is to distribute all of the income to my children each year so that the trust itself pays little to no tax,” he says.

news.title: ‘My husband is leery of my plan’: We are both 60 and have $5 million. Is now a good time to dip into our savings?
news.summary: “We have been scrimping for a long time. We have been working hard,” he said. “We’re looking forward to the next few weeks.”

news.title: This bond strategy can protect your portfolio even if interest rates go up
news.summary: A little-known investing formula shows exactly how long to hold bonds to neutralize interest-rate hikes. The formula is based on the U.S. Federal Reserve's benchmark interest rate.
